title: festuca ovina var. supina
intro: Festuca ovina var. supina, also known as sheep's fescue, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. supina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as a natural antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and support overall well-being.
